title: rubus × tenellus
intro: Rubus × tenellus, also known as Thimbleberry, is a hybrid of the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × tenellus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and arthritis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and supplements, making it a popular ingredient in natural medicine and a tasty addition to various recipes.
